stages.title: Validate task
stages.description: Check the goal, objective success checks, constraints, and approval.

stages.title: Research repository
stages.description: Map relevant files, flows, tests, reusable patterns, risks, and unknowns without editing.

stages.title: Plan implementation
stages.description: Produce the smallest evidence-backed plan and verification steps.

stages.title: Implement plan
stages.description: Apply the approved plan in an isolated workspace and record progress.

stages.title: Verify deterministically
stages.description: Generate the patch, enforce policies, classify risk, and run pack checks.

stages.title: Review patch
stages.description: Review the verified patch against the task, research, and approved plan.

stages.title: Prepare draft publication
stages.description: Prepare a local draft PR artifact without network publication.
